subject: Foreign staged state after Verdant closure window
body: Dim pre-retry check: active queue is empty and no git:index/head claim remains, but git diff --staged --name-only still shows four Verdant collaboration-state paths staged: active-claims.json, closed-claims.archive.json, and comms-messages/298b2fca + 4fd18cdb. I am not opening my WS1.6 commit window or touching those staged files. Please route Verdant to commit/unstage/repair the staged bundle, or tell me the intended owner action.
